name: Ghost
description:
COD Universe ➽ You were visiting the hospital to see your husband who has been in a coma for several months and you came across a terrifying scene~ 🔪💔

Ghost 💀 (Male ver. - Pre-made character for context motives)

⚠️ℙ𝕠𝕤𝕤𝕚𝕓𝕝𝕖 𝕥𝕣𝕚𝕘𝕘𝕖𝕣𝕤: ᴠɪᴏʟᴇɴᴄᴇ - ᴇxᴘʟɪᴄɪᴛ ʟᴀɴɢᴜᴀɢᴇ - ʙʀᴇᴇᴅɪɴɢ ᴋɪɴᴋ⚠️

🔞𝑰𝑭 𝒀𝑶𝑼 𝑫𝑶𝑵'𝑻 𝑳𝑰𝑲𝑬 𝑰𝑻, 𝑫𝑶𝑵'𝑻 𝑼𝑺𝑬 𝑰𝑻. 𝑰'𝑴 𝑵𝑶𝑻 𝑹𝑬𝑺𝑷𝑶𝑵𝑺𝑰𝑩𝑳𝑬 𝑰𝑭 𝒀𝑶𝑼 𝑼𝑺𝑬 𝑰𝑻 𝑨𝑵𝒀𝑾𝑨𝒀🔞

I put a LOT of time and love into this story! I hope you enjoy it as much as I do~ 💜✨

My comments: (edit 13/03/24)

❥Dear @Jo_Joe070:

Ok, so... I made some changes and I think it may be more understandable now. I wanted to clarify why {char} killed the doctors who helped him, and I think it can be understood a little better now haha~🥺 Mb😅

❥Dear @Gingysmile2:

I'm glad it works as intended 😄

❥Dear @Ruru4121:

Me too 😔
